offer.name: Athleisure brand discovery
offer.promise: High-performance athleisure for women who refuse to choose between studio and streetwear
offer.audience: Women 22-38, fitness enthusiasts, urban, basket avg $80-200, primary US/UK markets

goal.notes: Grow IG to 25k followers in 90 days

input.brief: IG-driven brand awareness. Angle: behind-the-scenes content from the design studio + real customer stories. Avoid hard-selling. Tone: confident, body-positive, technical when relevant.

notes: Tests Critic on audience-goal (no hard CTA expected). Reels script + IG carousel formats prioritized.
